cases.prompt: 이번 세션에서 내가 놓친 시각 찾아줘

assertions.text: Runs the Core 5 stakeholder audit (User, Business, Technical, Security, Future-self) plus 1-3 session-specific stakeholders
Appends one session-block to perspectives.md at the project root rather than overwriting prior blocks
Surfaces 1-3 actionable blind spots for this or the next session

cases.prompt: critical review of this session — what stakeholder did we forget?

assertions.text: Focuses on the missing stakeholder / un-considered persona rather than code defects
Treats the session itself (what was decided, built, skipped) as the input
Reads back prior accumulated perspectives.md blocks instead of running a fresh audit
